title: quercus × hispanica subvar. latifolia
intro: Quercus × hispanica subvar. latifolia, also known as the hybrid Spanish oak, is a deciduous tree that is a hybrid of Quercus robur and Quercus faginea. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × hispanica subvar. latifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The bark and leaves can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
